patch:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp b/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp
index 31b0cae7cb0c..28e7a8b801a5 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp
@@ -7836,6 +7836,7 @@ static bool isGuaranteedNotToBeUndefOrPoison(
     // If the value is a freeze instruction, then it can never
     // be undef or poison.
     if (isa<FreezeInst>(V))
+
       return true;
 
     if (const auto *CB = dyn_cast<CallBase>(V)) {
@@ -7858,10 +7859,37 @@ static bool isGuaranteedNotToBeUndefOrPoison(
       }
       if (IsWellDefined)
         return true;
+
+      // For a PHI node, even if all incoming values are not undef/poison,
+      // we cannot conclude it's not poison if there is a self-cycle and
+      // the initial value is not guaranteed non-poison.
+      // Specifically, we must ensure that the PHI is well-defined on all paths,
+      // including cycles. We already checked incoming values individually,
+      // but a PHI like "%p = phi i32 [ %p, %bb ]" with no non-poisonous start
+      // remains potentially poison.
+      //
+      // However, if the PHI has a well-defined (non-poison) incoming value on
+      // at least one path that can break the cycle (e.g. initial value 0),
+      // and all incoming values are either noundef or proven non-poison,
+      // then the PHI itself is non-poison when used in a freeze context.
+      //
+      // In this specific case, the optimization is safe when control flow
+      // ensures the PHI is initialized before use, but value tracking must
+      // not assume PHIs are non-poison unless all incoming values are
+      // guaranteed non-poison and there's no dependence on uninitialized state.
+      //
+      // Thus, we only allow the optimization when all incoming values are
+      // individually guaranteed not to be undef or poison, which we already
+      // checked above, but do not add extra inference beyond that.
+      //
+      // Returning true here would be too aggressive for cases like phi-self.ll
+      // where the value may be poison due to loop without defined start.
+      // Therefore, we do not add extra return true here.
     } else if (!::canCreateUndefOrPoison(Opr, Kind,
                                          /*ConsiderFlagsAndMetadata*/ true) &&
                all_of(Opr->operands(), OpCheck))
       return true;
+
   }
 
   if (auto *I = dyn_cast<LoadInst>(V))
